channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Fresh Perspective on Drug Gangs Controlling San Francisco Streets
Trump Rejects Claim That Iran Conflict Contradicts His 'No New Wars' Pledge
item.description: President Donald Trump is dismissing the notion that engaging in war with Iran this year contradicted his repeated campaign promise of "No new wars."

item.title: Video: Trump Clashes with Kristen Welker in Heated Interview, Ends with Walkout
Trump on Warsh: 'I Want Him to Do Whatever He Wants' on Rates
item.description: President Donald Trump used a "Meet the Press" interview Sunday to endorse new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh and renew his call for lower interest rates.
